item.title: GeoDataProcessor-MCP
item.description:
GeoDataProcessor-MCP is an MCP server for geospatial data processing tools.

It exposes WhiteBox and SAGA GIS style processing capabilities through a standardized interface so large language models and desktop agents can discover, inspect, and invoke geographic analysis tools.

item.title: PyGeoModel
item.description:
PyGeoModel is an intelligent Python package for urban and geographic modeling within Jupyter environments.

It combines model recommendation, interactive configuration, question answering, and service-based execution to make geographic modeling more accessible in computational notebooks.
